title: Use of English - Test 1
explanation:
Use of English - B1+ Test 1

Mixed grammar and vocabulary review.

questions.text: If I had studied harder, I [*would be|would have been|am] more confident in my job now.
The report [*is believed to contain|believes to contain|is believing contain] several errors.
She wishes her brother [*would stop|stopped to|had stopped now] borrowing her clothes.
By next summer, we [*will have saved|save|will be save] enough to move house.

exercise_sets.title: Exercise 2
exercise_sets.instructions: Choose the correct option for each gap.

questions.text: The employee asked ____ more time to finish the task. | *for | to | that
This is the university ____ my sister studied law. | *where | which | whose
He is very reliable and always keeps his ____.  | *word | weather | charge
The company launched a new advertising ____.  | *campaign | platform | conclusion
I regret [*not checking|to not check|did not check] the details more carefully.
questions.feedback: Regret can be followed by a gerund here.

questions.text: The meeting was postponed; [*however|therefore|for instance], nobody had prepared for that change.
He must [*have forgotten|forgeting|forgot] about the appointment.
The lecture, [*which was delayed|that delayed|where delayed], eventually started at noon.
